summary.contamination_definition: contaminated iff any Qwen-trained BailBench row contains a whole-word match for any >=3-char non-stopword content token from the harm stimulus's critical_span. Prefix-only matches (e.g., BailBench says 'poisoning' for harm span 'poison') are tracked via topic_coverage_prefix but do NOT set in_qwen_training.
